name: Find a library and delete it
fullName: Search libraries and books: Find a library and delete it

steps.name: And  I enter 'Brookfield Library' library and save name as 'libraryName' on add account screen
Then  Library 'libraryName' is present on add account screen
When  Clear search field on add account screen
Then  Search field is empty on add account screen

labels.name: story
labels.value: Find a library and delete it

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Find a library and delete it
